scripts.test: node test/test_gas_logger.js && node test/test_survey_model.js && node test/test_manage_deployments.js && node test/test_callwebapp.js
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run push -- --skip-bump && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run push -- --skip-bump && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run push -- --skip-bump && git push --follow-tags
